query:
SELECT c.id, c.corretorId, c.tipoConquistaId, tc.nome, tc.categoria
FROM conquistas c 
JOIN tipos_conquista tc ON c.tipoConquistaId = tc.id
WHERE c.corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%kauan%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT c.id, c.corretorId, c.tipoConquistaId, tc.nome, tc.categoria
